title: System, method and apparatus for upgrading a pulverizer
abstract: A method of upgrading a vertical spindle pulverizer includes the steps of removing a cover from a journal opening in a housing of the pulverizer to access a grinding zone of the pulverizer, removing a first journal assembly having a toroidal grinding roll from the pulverizer through the journal opening, removing a plurality of toroidal table segments from a grinding table of the pulverizer, installing a plurality of inclined bull ring segments on the grinding table, installing a second journal assembly having a conical grinding roll in the pulverizer, and replacing the cover over the journal opening. The inclined bull ring segments are configured to register with a grinding surface of the conical grinding roll.
claims:
Claims 1. A method of upgrading a vertical spindle pulverizer (10), comprising the steps of: removing a cover from a journal opening (18) in a housing (12) of the pulverizer (10) to access a grinding zone of the pulverizer (10); removing a first journal assembly having a toroidal grinding roll (22) from the pulverizer (10) through the journal opening (18); removing a plurality of toroidal table segments from a grinding table (14) of the pulverizer (10); installing a plurality of inclined bull ring segments (126) on the grinding table (14); installing a second journal assembly (1 10) having a conical grinding roll (112) in the pulverizer (10); and replacing the cover over the journal opening (18); wherein the inclined bull ring segments (126) are configured to register with a grinding surface of the conical grinding roll (112). 2. The method according to claim 1, further comprising the step of: installing a stop bolt (118) on the cover prior to replacing the cover; wherein the stop bolt (118) is configured to determine a spacing between the conical grinding roll (112) and the inclined bull ring segments (126) of the grinding table (14). 3. The method according to claim 2, further comprising the step of: removing a journal spring assembly (122) of the pulverizer (10) prior to removing the first journal assembly. 4. The method according to claim 3, further comprising the step of: installing the journal spring assembly (122) on the cover after installing the stop bolt (118) and prior to replacing the cover. 5. The method according to any one of claims 1 to 4, wherein: the second journal assembly (110) includes a bolted connection between a journal shaft (114) and pivot bracket (115) of the journal assembly (110). 6. The method according to any one of claims 1 to 5, wherein: 

 the step of installing the second journal assembly (110) in the pulverizer (10) includes mounting the second journal assembly (110) to a pivot bracket (115) on which the journal assembly (11) is configured to pivot via two opposed pivot shaft segments (114). 7. The method according to claim 6, wherein: the opposed pivot shaft segments (114) are spaced from one another and do not extend a length of the pivot bracket. 8. The method according to any one of claims 1 to 7, further comprising the step of: adjusting the rotational speed of the grinding table (14) in dependence upon the geometry of the conical grinding roll (112). 9. A method for increasing the capacity of a vertical spindle pulverizer (10), comprising the steps of: removing a cover from a journal opening (18) in the pulverizer (10) to access a grinding zone of the pulverizer (10); removing a first journal assembly having a generally toroidal grinding roll (22) from the pulverizer (10) through the journal opening (18); removing a plurality of generally toroidal table segments from a grinding table (14) of the pulverizer (10); installing a plurality of generally inclined bull ring segments (126) on the grinding table (14); installing a second journal assembly (1 10) having a conical grinding roll (112) in the pulverizer (10); and replacing the cover over the journal opening (18). 10. The method according to claim 9, wherein: the step of installing the second journal assembly (110) having the conical grinding roll (112) includes: inserting the second journal assembly (110) having the conical grinding roll (112) through the journal opening (18); arranging the second journal assembly (110) having the conical grinding roll (112) in the grinding zone of the pulverizer (10); and mounting the second journal assembly (110) to a pivot bracket (115) on which the journal assembly (110) is configured to pivot via two opposed pivot shaft segments (114). 11. The method according to claim 10, wherein: the opposed pivot shaft segments (114) are spaced from one another and do not extend a length of the pivot bracket (115). 12. The method according to any of claims 9 to 11, wherein: the inclined bull ring segments (126) are configured to register with a grinding surface of the conical grinding roll (112). 13. The method according to any of claims 9 to 12, further comprising the step of: installing a stop bolt (118) on the cover prior to replacing the cover; wherein the stop bolt (118) is configured to determine a spacing between the conical grinding roll (112) and the flat bull ring segments (126) of the grinding table (14). 14. The method according to claim 13, further comprising the steps of: removing a journal spring assembly (122) of the pulverizer (10) prior to removing the first journal assembly; and installing the journal spring assembly (122) on the cover after installing the stop bolt (118) and prior to replacing the cover. 15. The method according to claim 14, wherein: the second journal assembly (110) includes a bolted connection between a journal shaft (114) and the pivot bracket (115). 16. A vertical spindle pulverizer, comprising: a housing having a shaft coupled for rotation therein; a grinding table rotatably mounted on the shaft, the grinding table having a plurality of generally flat bull ring segments that have been retrofit onto the grinding table in place of generally toroidal table segments; a journal assembly pivotally mounted on the pulverizer housing; and a generally conical grinding roll coupled to the journal assembly; wherein the journal assembly and grinding roll are retrofit into the pulverizer in place of an existing journal assembly having a generally toroidal grinding roll. 17. The vertical spindle pulverizer of clause 16, wherein: 

 the journal assembly is pivotally mounted on the pulverizer housing via two opposed pivot shaft segments that do not extend a length of a pivot bracket and are accessible from outside of the housing.
